sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79809" key="paroxeteute/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παροχετ-ευτέον</orth>, <sense id="n79809.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must divert</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀντισπαστέον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.100</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
